title: St. Elmo's Fire
author: Atmospheric Electrical Physics
content: A glowing, blue or violet plasma discharge appearing on pointed objects during thunderstorms.
action: Strong electrical fields are present, indicating a high risk of lightning strikes nearby.

title: Ball Lightning
author: Rare Atmospheric Phenomenon
content: A spherical, luminous object that drifts through the air, often during or after a storm.
action: Indicates intense, localized atmospheric energy discharge.

title: Brocken Spectre
author: Optical Physics
content: A giant, magnified shadow of an observer cast upon clouds or mist, surrounded by a rainbow halo.
action: Low sun angle and specific cloud/fog density are interacting with the observer's silhouette.

title: Bioluminescence
author: Marine Biology
content: Waves or footprints glowing with a bright neon-blue light at night.
action: A bloom of dinoflagellates is reacting to physical agitation in the water.

title: Fata Morgana
author: Atmospheric Optics
content: Objects on the horizon, like ships or islands, appear distorted, stacked, or floating in the air.
action: Strong temperature inversions are bending light rays to create complex superior mirages.
